message:
feat(gateway/checkpoint): migrate from in-memory to SQLite storage

## Storage Migration
- Remove in-memory Maps (checkpoints, agentCheckpoints)
- Add Drizzle ORM queries for checkpoint CRUD operations
- Store checkpoint state as JSON in checkpoints table

## API Changes
- getCheckpoint(): Query DB instead of Map lookup
- getAgentCheckpoints(): Query with ORDER BY createdAt DESC
- getLatestCheckpoint(): Use LIMIT 1 with ORDER BY
- createCheckpoint(): INSERT into checkpoints table
- resolveDeltaCheckpoint(): Async DB lookups for parent chain

## Delta Resolution
- Fix parent checkpoint resolution to use async getCheckpoint()
- Add type assertions for DeltaCheckpoint in restore flow

## Benefits
- Checkpoints persist across gateway restarts
- Enables future features: checkpoint export, multi-node sync
- Proper ordering by creation time

Includes comprehensive test suite for all checkpoint operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
